en: And the night goes by so very slow.
Oh, I hope that it won't end, though, alone.
Too bad, I always got by on my own.
I never really cared until I met you.
ko: 널 만나기 전까지는 신경 쓴 적 없었어.

en: And now it chills me to the bone.
ko: 이제 뼛속까지 차가워져. 어떻게 네 사랑을 얻을 수 있을까?

en: How do I get your love?
You don't know how long I ever wanted to touch your lips and hold you tight, oh.
ko: 네 입술에 닿고 꼭 안고 싶었던 게 얼마나 오래됐는지 넌 몰라.
